# [PHASE 13] Critical Tests

## Phase Overview
- **Phase Number**: 13
- **Phase Title**: Testing
- **Estimated Duration**: Week 16-17
- **Dependencies**: All previous phases
- **Estimated Hours**: 24

## Task Description
Implement critical security and functionality tests

## Detailed Requirements
- [ ] Tenant isolation tests (cross-tenant data leak prevention)
- [ ] RBAC permission tests (every role + permission combination)
- [ ] Module guard tests (access blocked when module not installed)
- [ ] Payment webhook signature verification tests
- [ ] Auth flow tests (login, session, logout, expiry)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All backend functions implemented and tested
- [ ] All frontend pages created and responsive
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code review approved

## Files to Create/Modify
`tests/**/*.test.ts`

## Testing Requirements
- [ ] Unit tests for all functions
- [ ] Integration tests for workflows
- [ ] E2E tests for critical user journeys
- [ ] Performance tests if applicable

## Technical Notes
This task is part of Phase 13: Testing and must be completed according to the implementation plan specifications.
